weather_anchor.headline: {{city}} storm season: did your roof take a hit?
weather_anchor.body: After high wind and hail risk near {{landmark}}, shingles in {{neighborhood}} can hide damage until the next heavy rain. Document early and compare quotes from certified locals.

material_comparison.title: Standard shingles vs. impact-minded systems for {{city}}

table_rows.cheap: More prone to cracking at ~1.0" hail

table_rows.premium: Transferable warranties when installed to spec

landmark_proximity.text: Look for crews with local references, not just out-of-state storm chasing. Pros working {{county}} regularly understand {{city}} codes near {{landmark}}.

interactive_cost_logic.markup:
Estimate snapshot

A typical ~2,000 sq.ft. roof in {{city}} often lands roughly $9k–$16.5k for quality architectural shingles—pitch, layers, and decking repairs move the number.
